title: Grambling State University HBCU College Campus Tour Grambling Louisiana
body: This music wow 🔥🔥👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽Byron Cage , this selection with the saxophone sound .. I know that’s a gospel song too , I can’t put my finger on it ! This was a phenomenal video ! Great shots, musical selection, the beginning to the end . The notable alumni, I wouldn’t have guessed E40 and Erika Badu🔥🔥🔥🔥Congrats to almost 1K

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body: I’m going to Grambling as a freshman in the fall  , I’m so excited! Thank you for this vid cuz I beeen looking for raw and uncut advice❤️❤️ .
author: @shamyraboykins8245

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body: I graduated from grambling back in 2011, and started in 2007. Loved my time at Grambling!! Nothing like a hbcu in the world. It's a hell of alot of partying that can be done and you gotta make sure you dont let that detract you from getting your work done! Cause I almost failed out my freshman year cause I ain't go to class AT ALL!! LOL but I got it together n had my head in the game and learned to balance out school and fun!! Make sure you get the grades first!! Dont wanna waste time.
author: @Allthingzboxing817

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body: Im an incoming freshman and i dont even have a dorm either.  Im stuck trying to get an apartment in Ruston or going somewhere else. You're right about them not having structure,  ive been told so many different things smh

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body: I’ll be a transfer junior this fall and you are about the housing filling up fast, that i was on the because on banner web they wouldn’t let me pick they had to call us with our room assigned to us because of the capacity but i got my room and classes so we in there ! #GramFM ✊🏾
author: @ObeyShawty24

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body: I'll be a transfer junior at Gram this fall and girrrlll u were spot on about them needing structure!!! I'm stuck in a dorm bc that housing went quiiiiIIICCKK! Im barely getting into classes I need, like its been a four week process just trying to get things in order with them... I'm just trying to look past it because I'm just excited to be going there in the fall. Also, thanks for making this video because I sure have been looking.
author: @shelbyluellen307

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯

title: The truth !GRAMBLING STATE UNIVERSITY Pros/cons🐯
body:
Wow sounds like you gotta make your own fun. But don't seem fun at all. And all they have is junk food for choice. Well to bad don't know one wants to help

I thought that is what is all about. One thing for sure. I don't hear to many black folks talk about a four year college like they use too.

I guess It's all A Hype. And why the graduation rate is low like 41% anyways thanks for the input.

title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COLLEGE STUDENT ✰ GSU baddie || classes, church, friends, shopping, etc
body:
For Gentle Correction: "Lord, correct me, but with judgment; not in your anger, lest you bring me to nothing" (Jeremiah 10:24). "Please humble me gently, not correcting me in your anger but in transforming me by your discipline and grace".
For Humility and Teachability: "Dear God, if I am wrong, right me. If I am lost, guide me. If I start giving up, keep me going. Lead me in light and love".
For Aligning with God's Will: "Search me, O God, and know my heart... See if there is any offensive way in me; lead me in the way everlasting" (Psalm 139:23-24).
author: @NaNa_Godlyvision
